mechanism_narrative: Positive momentum in real activity-sensitive demand, measured by rising retail sales, transmits to stronger expected corporate revenues and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest RSAFS value is 680591.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if higher RSAFS 3-month momentum is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns no more often than the unconditional hit rate over a 3-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses above 1.0%, the market reprices discount rates upward faster than earnings expectations adjust, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest FEDFUNDS value is 1.21 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have mean 20-day S&P 500 returns greater than or equal to the unconditional mean, or if the downside hit rate is below 50% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A low unemployment rate combined with payroll expansion signals resilient household income and consumption, supporting earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE below 4.0% and PAYEMS 3-month change positive
evidence_refs: fact:latest UNRATE value is 3.6 and PAYEMS value is 151980.0 as of t-1mo
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with tight labor markets
failure_condition: Reject if low-UNRATE and rising-PAYEMS instances do not deliver higher average 60-day S&P 500 returns than other instances in at least 60% of walk-forward folds.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer prices alongside a rising policy rate creates an inflation-tightening mix that compresses equity valuation multiples and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month change positive and FEDFUNDS 3-month change positive
evidence_refs: fact:latest CPIAUCSL value is 295.328 and FEDFUNDS value is 1.21 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS momentum signal has a nonnegative rank correlation with subsequent 20-day S&P 500 returns over two consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Improving industrial production reflects stronger operating leverage and goods-sector output, raising near-term earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest INDPRO value is 104.3648 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO momentum is followed by lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than negative INDPRO momentum in a statistically significant walk-forward comparison.

mechanism_narrative: A downside crossing in housing starts signals weakening interest-rate-sensitive demand and future construction activity, reducing cyclical earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest HOUST value is 1549.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside crossings below 1500 are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate marks deterioration in labor income and recession risk, leading investors to cut earnings forecasts and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses 0.3 percentage points above its 3-month low
evidence_refs: fact:latest UNRATE value is 3.6 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases have average 20-day S&P 500 returns that are not below the unconditional average by at least 25 basis points.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous strength in retail sales and industrial production with falling unemployment identifies a broad growth impulse that improves revenue breadth and risk appetite, producing positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and INDPRO 3-month changes positive while UNRATE 3-month change nonpositive
evidence_refs: fact:latest RSAFS is 680591.0, INDPRO is 104.3648, and UNRATE is 3.6
failure_condition: Reject if the three-series growth impulse has a 5-day forward hit rate at or below 50% or a negative mean return across walk-forward triggered observations.
